story.iWant: GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for automated quality validation
story.soThat: all commits and PRs are automatically tested

tasks.task: Configure OWASP Dependency Check plugin in Gradle
Test CI pipeline with intentional failure
Verify pipeline execution time <15min for CI
Configure pipeline status badges in README.md

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: CI pipeline runs: build, ktlint, Detekt, unit tests, integration tests
Nightly pipeline runs: property tests, fuzz tests, mutation tests, concurrency tests
Pipeline runs on: push to main, pull requests, nightly schedule
All pipelines pass with current codebase
Pipeline results visible in GitHub Actions

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.section: FR008: Quality Gates with Configurable Profiles
doc.snippet: The system shall enforce automated quality gates (ktlint, Detekt, Konsist, Pitest, Testcontainers) with configurable profiles (fast <30s, standard <3min, thorough <15min), flaky test detection, and clear failure diagnostics.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: The system shall achieve audit-ready security compliance including OWASP ASVS 5.0 (100% Level 1, 50% Level 2), automated OWASP dependency scanning in CI/CD with zero critical vulnerabilities in production.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: The framework mandates Test-Driven Development through the Red-Green-Refactor cycle, enforced by Git hooks, CI/CD pipelines, and code review requirements. All production code must be written test-first with ≥85% coverage and 60-70% mutation score validation.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` - Fast feedback (<15min) and `.github/workflows/nightly.yml` - Deep validation (~2.5h) with property-based tests, fuzz tests, concurrency tests, and mutation testing.

doc.title: Technical Specification - Epic 1
doc.snippet: Epic 1 technical context including foundation infrastructure patterns, Gradle configuration, and quality gate setup.

artifact.reason: OWASP Dependency Check aggregate task configuration that needs to be integrated into CI/CD security pipeline
Quality gate tool versions (ktlint, detekt, konsist, pitest, kover, dependency-check) that must be referenced in CI/CD workflows
Existing development setup script referenced in Story 1.6 - CI/CD should validate shell scripts with shellcheck

constraints.constraint: All CI/CD pipelines must use GitHub Actions - no alternative CI systems
CI pipeline (fast feedback) must complete in <15 minutes
Nightly pipeline (deep validation) target ~2.5 hours total
All pipelines must enforce zero-violations policy for ktlint and Detekt
Property tests, fuzz tests, and mutation tests run only in nightly pipeline (too slow for CI)
Security review pipeline must run OWASP dependency check and fail on critical vulnerabilities
Constitutional TDD enforcement: all pipelines validate test-first development (≥85% coverage)
Pipeline triggers: CI on push/PR, nightly via cron schedule, security weekly
Consider shellcheck static analysis for bash scripts (recommendation from Story 1.6)

interface.name: Gradle Quality Gate Tasks
interface.signature: ./gradlew ktlintCheck --no-daemon ./gradlew detekt --no-daemon ./gradlew test --no-daemon ./gradlew integrationTest --no-daemon ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze --no-daemon ./gradlew pitest --no-daemon (nightly only)

interface.name: GitHub Actions Workflow Events

tests.standards: EAF follows Constitutional TDD with mandatory Red-Green-Refactor cycle enforced by Git hooks, CI/CD pipelines, and code review. 7-layer defense-in-depth strategy: Static (ktlint, Detekt, Konsist) → Unit (Kotest) → Integration (Testcontainers) → Property-Based (Kotest properties) → Fuzz (Jazzer) → Concurrency (LitmusKt) → Mutation (Pitest). All tests use Kotest 6.0.4 framework exclusively (JUnit forbidden). Integration tests use Testcontainers for real dependencies (PostgreSQL, Keycloak, Redis). Quality targets: ≥85% line coverage (Kover), 60-70% mutation score (Pitest).

ideas.idea: Test ci.yml workflow syntax and task execution order (build → format → static → unit → integration)
Test nightly.yml workflow with long-running test tasks (property, fuzz, concurrency, mutation)
Test security-review.yml OWASP dependency check integration and report generation
Verify workflow triggers: push events, PR events, cron schedule, manual dispatch
Create intentional failures to validate pipeline error detection (format violation, test failure, security vuln)
Validate GitHub Actions UI displays all workflow runs with correct status badges
